info.title: dbAPI Admin API
info.description: Control-plane API for managing dbAPI instance resources: per-DB API definitions, DB connections, network policies, schema introspection/overrides/effective schema, hooks, and lifecycle operations (validate/activate/deactivate).

Location.description: URL of the created API resource

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: If true, deletes even if active (implementation-specific).

put.summary: Set/replace DB connection config (password is write-only)

get.summary: Get connection status and non-secret fields (never returns password)

post.summary: Test DB connection (no state change besides lastTest metadata)

put.summary: Set network policy for Config/Admin endpoints of this API (control plane per API)

get.summary: Get network policy for Config/Admin endpoints

put.summary: Set network policy for Data API endpoints (data plane)

get.summary: Get network policy for Data API endpoints

post.summary: Scan DB structure and regenerate the introspected schema snapshot

200.description: Introspection done (sync). Returns the new introspected snapshot.

get.summary: Get the last introspected schema snapshot (read-only)
Get effective schema after merge(introspected, overrides) (read-only)

post.summary: Rebuild cached artifacts/routes from effective schema
Preview effective schema using provided overrides without persisting them
Validate whether the API can be activated (connection, policies, schema readiness)
Deactivate API (implementation may keep config intact)

get.summary: Get authentication policy for the Data API

put.summary: Set authentication policy for the Data API

post.summary: Test authentication policy wiring (DB proc exists, returns expected shape, etc.)

ApiId.name: apiId
ApiId.description: Internal API identifier (stable, not the display name)

Conflict.description: Conflict (invalid state, name already exists, not ready, etc.)

dbFingerprint.description: Optional hash/fingerprint of DB structure for change detection

proto.description: DB type proto (e.g., int, varchar, uuid)

name.description: Relation name as exposed by effective schema / API expansions

version.description: Version/hash of the effective schema (for caching/ETag)

name.description: Procedure/view name OR SQL template identifier

contractName.description: Procedure/view name for password update, if using DB-side update
